description: Behavior and pattern blocklist for MCP servers. Prefer behavior-based entries over unverified accusations against named projects.

entries.description: MCP server launches code through a shell and remote pipe pattern.

metadata.rationale: Remote pipe-to-shell prevents provenance and content review.

entries.description: MCP server points at a public webhook or request collection endpoint.

metadata.rationale: Common exfiltration and testing endpoints should not receive agent data by default.

entries.description: MCP server arguments expose Docker socket control.

metadata.rationale: Docker socket access is often equivalent to host-level control.

entries.description: Filesystem-like MCP server is configured against sensitive home credential paths.

metadata.rationale: Sensitive home paths require brokered access and approval.
